name: noc-kg-editor
description: Local notary-facing editor companion for usecase knowledge graphs.

interface.shortDescription: Open notarial usecase KGs as safe forms and checklists.
interface.longDescription: Local Codex plugin for notaries and notary-office staff. It opens usecase-local knowledge graphs through a safe no-code editor view, renders open information, documents, decisions, gates and evidence without exposing value fields, and keeps all changes in a proposal-only patch, validation, review and pull-request flow.
defaultPrompt: Open the KG editor for a notarial usecase.
Create a KG editor session sheet.
Validate a KG patch before PR.
